subject: Super Saiyan Son Goku with golden energy blazing around him in orange gi, in an aggressive forward combat pose
suspected_ip: Son Goku / Super Saiyan Son Goku (Dragon Ball Z)
description: A spiky-haired figure in an orange martial arts gi blazes with golden and white Super Saiyan energy. The figure leans forward aggressively, arms at the side with energy crackling all around the body. The hair appears upright and electric with golden energy. The background is a bright golden-white energy field. The foil treatment gives the card additional shimmer to the energy effects. The pose conveys overwhelming forward pressure — kinetic aggression about to be unleashed.
foreground: spiky-haired figure in orange gi radiating golden Super Saiyan energy
emotion: overwhelming aggression, barely-contained power about to be unleashed
